clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend,Polls are closing soon, and this is our final opportunity to send a strong conservative fighter to the United States Senate!President Trump endorsed me because he knows I will stand with him, fight for the America First agenda, and never waver for the people of Louisiana. Now, I’m asking for your vote.Every single vote matters, and we cannot leave anything on the table. | | | | | | | If you have not voted yet, please head to the polls before they close and bring your friends and family with you.Louisiana deserves strong conservative leadership that will put our families, our values, and our state first.Thank you for your support, your prayers, and your belief in this campaign. Let’s finish strong.God bless,Julia Letlow | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Julia Letlow for Louisiana | | | | | Copyright © 2026 Julia Letlow for Louisiana, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Julia Letlow for Louisiana P.O. Box 106 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . |

Dear **Peter** , This is Anne Mace. I spent my life teaching children. But my daughter, Nancy Mace, learned the hard way. As a mom, there’s nothing harder than watching your child fight a battle you can’t fight for them. But because of you— _**_because of your support_**_ —my daughter can keep going. [**_Today, I want to personally thank you, Peter._**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/BsScYrwV6NRQjwpH7wUT5XshdnI6bfnS9NAlD61I2KFlixtUC05HGWQcvyp-okCzB5LRz9jNHfZAzBO87-CeDqRYZqk1znanQLMLvqXhNzz15njGElkjTxZS6y2QGbq_u9Yvz2FBfb1o_FQezNfAG8fXd3Wwy8ev7Td7FtvIqOBZ58-N2lO0pCgs1klt7Wl4-s1GWAcMfemd5P5xphSPW_Jj0wr3vLPeeCfBcb9VqK8x_O2Hm4iu7nKJ-VSbbxcq2brQW53fob8PhBbhB4a6G8eI2-2s6mkucwRts6YEN0dKilxB3xh1BAQIvbEd5_wXx7Ezj7f-Ks9A-ugX2vgLenpDX26p6n4Jys3hdKOjGyHLRz3uC8To4ANJmh2X3qdO5wJBNVXxuL1gK8w9K0trZutL3xYSfgvitXIKY1txzgROhYYv6dwG-zS8VCdPfvmO-yN3YWX1tayJkieVMRezdfvQjw3To4Jbbn7gRXQO_gaSCIxTHwhXMHN1eGswzbSLAEWt4Z6XnJ-QHk1s3_df3vi5yO8EJx29BpFZXMd93Gl36xtouH8wqkW-l7DLEEPfolBZ3QjdHR60yMk12MswtZX8AZ0QuCrxD8DjLP7NJDCEymKoyFdb_xtCejYF_koxLXV1SRMAxuQvca8aq7bUCs8oUQvLCmsmkJz_CgfjnXJKfCe9X61lbq4Rbj07Rub8WIKNM2dRNgAQP97zzxtVkAokbMvLh3i6mq5GJQ7_yiZRyCPYXkfF-mkP3idREq6N8EUWLMBjIYVgD-3884R56I44s4nZfjEw4XSSl4PxqPdC4GqZhn1MDFERLE4KfFNiIZD44dQIEEjKvlFzMjSwuPaFBpbPMPhG39fGAFQjP973nBOtMUPPyQDEso3wX5Xh4qz_h8QuN46sYMrzfn-QLNd55zL2SqyJAZ_AYhjmoXp9OGK-XoBgraF5PRuCG4Ap6r0I49t4A9aOXwi2cv8PEaQTlRP1ncqyd1y36AipxlrKgNy-eaj_Kox4eltwZtSq2rY54OrN5kO_prw6N3i5GVKZdWVIiPwnPVe_MNahrGcQcg16iokCHnqXsShqMvRIyO8QwA4ulc6E6Gf2W-fScXrP60jCOnrhAt4YpBkeSdM_FG0AiSgXRq1Eo6Ssumaej0BFjgJWX7r_jE2XZ2Dx9xMwCQM_AQsITDIhz2FRZ7_lfmWmdjBX/M8_l1tRCnbbPnhbRdixTKJ3rxOyjTIx8/20) Let me explain.

[**When Nancy was 17, she dropped out of high school.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/cc_5B8y7Y4VqHYyVYglrJvmVpr5bjdE7tfLYu6T0cbBvE6vyd0luWC3dUdBVaJSU_DKE77SUD9v6-A0oXd0n22aysvOMgpuorOExQv2mB9s5SOmkOcP4fKd3urbgo3ko5RQjBHmTMkQdw6LeAwX8_I3N7YUDYJkC09DA0-B6UImwsd4yRSVhlg7VCrGJHn4dEyY62A9RC4QiXJKqwEOYGKZwjmtWKLV7oDPvYGbT6MO0vX9F2sZ2iWn4mZ_blJyQ9cVg46J-KRGitBwJ9Jka-hTee1ZeKwzJWpQtSAmKNUChB2SbemvUpLVVG7nmo3p4dR2LWJbp0OaLxCkdTZL10RwtthhIx9wCi_Oh4EiDg9geWcsVGpTlS1eNHVb2O-5RfQBdVulvIcKNfToTwgCx4-h7F9BGsiNry2xgsM35y9FH0RFeNJjcg5lTrLykA_YnEN2_A-sH5tfxPKeo5NDWu7HSE_GwObpc9N1vZcMpZKVMZsBQ4gy532LLNRaPPCUgvDLnzJapkBr5zJu-cEdnudc6cAc-ewVFRnLOM_bQCw_9__glLO6YZRpEXgCwUofQ1hAttRaTLPJODqlBfj0aXjQobm2gEeON9l1R7PKvu63TL_Eq2eeBbF5JJiMyOQXNWJJHnMfV2d9a8ERmyQmdMupCJxK1MmMidgHjUt5xHYOg-Q6A2S_zy1v15v6WjkKWNXxkfl0mgOQ_8ZxkbOGPEY72vnuMA8O2gR3wwP86jxaFOmO_xjwldq87UzFZ_U9j2AmOpoafTehr8rzxK8vGWhT0eaA216vPa_A0mReipPRYlyWwLFTnr4Bd03OGXTCqh2QZ295CTHKjwECS0v5ZQsoh0SxmqB6M5muutfvHaOzFsERN4QxDdfc2H4hnxiaV2B8QiRL5sbODbn_Zq4U6WQDQbyaJRB-jfKrVic5r1IB-tllIp3c0anfASA0iTZ5gtdyMRwgYfwXGnOQd6ATtWu1OtFG2g9fZX_DahFwOUBlkVH25YMI5lNtoyBwfcG8m-iDNIdrMBKASd7cuOeStyt7LvpAFv3n8C65qxMdWfGrqogxAM1gRDItafKX658l4VSTTcaBi051ND9qGoLOgYot5kCi0e4-kI-WTen7hXy2DD3fsOAr8hF9hfcJH6xmBwZ74O_6Yf2iyFPMkjlOcPk-JPUkyexRu-D9GUnOurpUzms73Jgbo/NpZfZ-pc-05tpJnu3vcqflIBmZW2yvPO/20) I remember the night she told my husband and me. _Her hands were shaking._ She thought she’d disappointed everyone she loved. But we raised her to believe that setbacks don’t define you—**how you rise does.** With a WWII veteran for a father and a schoolteacher for a mother, she grew up hearing the same lessons over and over again: 👉 _Never quit._ _👉 Never run from the truth.__👉 And never let anyone tell you that you are**less than what God made you to be.**_ So we gave her a choice: **Go back to school... or get a job.** Most kids in that situation fall apart. But not Nancy. | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Dear Peter , This is Anne Mace. I spent my life teaching children. But my daughter, Nancy Mace, learned the hard way. As a mom, there’s nothing harder than watching your child fight a battle you can’t fight for them. But because of you— because of your support —my daughter can keep going. Let me explain. I remember the night she told my husband and me. Her hands were shaking. She thought she’d disappointed everyone she loved. But we raised her to believe that setbacks don’t define you—how you rise does. With a WWII veteran for a father and a schoolteacher for a mother, she grew up hearing the same lessons over and over again: 👉 Never quit. 👉 Never run from the truth.👉 And never let anyone tell you that you areless than what God made you to be. So we gave her a choice: Go back to school... or get a job. Most kids in that situation fall apart. But not Nancy. She picked herself up, took a job at Waffle House, and fought her way back. Soon after, she was elected as the first woman to represent South Carolina in the U.S. House of Representatives. She’s been fighting her whole life; for herself, for her kids, for the truth, and now... for her state. As a mother, I’ve been blessed to see the overwhelming support she’s received from patriots across the nation. But each day that goes out there and fights for you, she’s up against the knife. The Establishment has its pitchforks aimed at my daughter. They stalk her. Send her death threats. She’s even been physically assaulted. As a mom, I won’t lie—it’s hard sitting back and watching Nancy face relentless attacks day after day. But Nancy is my daughter. And I know this: She never backs down. And she never stops fighting. So today, I have just one ask: Peter , if Nancy’s going to pull this off and save our beloved state of South Carolina, she needs your backup. Please, from a mother who loves her daughter with everything she has... Help fight the battle against the Radical Left with her. name: Annie Andrews
subject: I used to race bikes. Now I’m racing to defeat Lindsey Graham.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
Growing up with two brothers, I had a fierce competitive streak.
I was the only girl on my little league baseball team and could catch my dad’s pop-flies in the backyard better than my brothers.
The three of us would set up Indy 500-style bike races on our cul-de-sac. Winner got bragging rights. Loser got the snacks from the house. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
Fast forward a few decades and I’m channeling that same energy into a much bigger race: Taking down Lindsey Graham and flipping South Carolina blue.
He’s been in the Senate since I was 22. I’ve had 3 kids, cared for thousands more, and taught hundreds of med students and residents.
And let me tell you — they all deserve better than the future Lindsey Graham is fighting for.
I’m in this race because I’ve got fire. I’ve got purpose. And unlike him, I’ve got a soul.
But, I’ve never been the one to back down from a tough race. That’s why I’ve set an ambitious $250,000 fundraising goal to show Graham that we have the power to win this.
Can I count on you to rush a split donation of $10 between Resist Reclaim Rebuild and my campaign right away so we can hit our April goals? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
HELP ME DEFEAT LINDSEY GRAHAM! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
We've got a race to win.
Annie
CHIP IN TO STOP MAGA EXTREMISM!>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]

The stakes of 2025 and 2026 couldn’t be higher. Republicans are already laying the groundwork for a full MAGA takeover — and they’re being bankrolled by billionaires and special interests who are willing to pour unlimited money into rigging the system.
That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund: to invest early in grassroots Democratic candidates who can’t be drowned out by dark money. Together with Resist Reclaim Rebuild, we’re building campaigns that are rooted in people power, not billionaire’s wealth.
Every flyer that gets printed, every ad that goes up, every volunteer that knocks on doors costs money. And without us, groups like Resist Reclaim Rebuild would be facing this fight alone.
But the truth is: we can only win if grassroots Democrats like you chip in today.

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: this was a crushing blow for our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| Donald Trump’s Supreme Court justices took a sledgehammer to our fundamental right to vote
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2277%2E259176%2Et8o6rc) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2277%2E259176%2Et8o6rc)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11332?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.16_Abrams-SCOTUS-decision_B5_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=4&akid=2277%2E259176%2Et8o6rc) Peter, Donald Trump’s Supreme Court justices recently gutted what was left of the Voting Rights Act. I’ve spent my career fighting against voter suppression tactics that try to silence Americans and dilute the power of Black and Brown people. The VRA ended Jim Crow and made my work possible. Now, this Supreme Court decision is trying to end the Voting Rights Act for good, and it has officially put our democracy on life support. From Congress to your state legislatures, everything we deserve is at risk. [**We are going to raise $100,000 before midnight to show that no laws can silence or disempower us. Will you split a donation between Speak Up PAC and Blue Amp Action to elect Democrats at every level of government who will fight to restore voting rights across the country?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11332?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.16_Abrams-SCOTUS-decision_B5_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=5&akid=2277%2E259176%2Et8o6rc) | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11332?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.16_Abrams-SCOTUS-decision_B5_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=6&akid=2277%2E259176%2Et8o6rc)
---
Together,
Stacey Abrams
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_temp_2026?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.XX.XX_footer_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX&amount=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&t=7&refcode2=2277_259176_t8o6rc&akid=2277%2E259176%2Et8o6rc)
---
We’re facing a critical moment in American history, which means what we do right now will define the future of our nation and our world.

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. We’re amplifying good candidates who are passionate about protecting civil rights, making life affordable, and leaving a better world for future generations.

The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

**[Chip in to Blue Amp Action today to support our mission and help us continue boosting Democratic champions and holding extremists accountable. Every contribution – $10, $25, or even $100 – allows us to keep amplifying real leaders who will fight for our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_temp_2026?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.XX.XX_footer_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX&amount=10&t=8&refcode2=2277_259176_t8o6rc&akid=2277%2E259176%2Et8o6rc)**

name: President Donald J. Trump
subject: A disappointing mid-month update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
This can't wait until tomorrow. | | | [](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=7fca37c6444a41bd983370f1f52b7ccc&_e=PLTgDfog7CExqjjYzSkF6Rs8LSoBZ5VibKHiwKOB-v0CPGpGyj4-W2VMEldEDLujVeyDszsq8BBZUiMMZX5rExnRKfHVAfycFJSPRBMGgeTmpenAIqWWQJtIphSSVfUl-CRhwLj3bPcTmB00av3ASnTk8HFb0yc-FToSuwVqHfRAnm8nLSr4SbxFYnNXTWyxeYe274m7_zq_xNgD1USzBrPAEdIGhDLuDBXc0f_ju5VLAGt62MGA2rV4KfjZHzVXg5asLFtZge9NdbWbbPzboUQRfV2ljTGDB6DiTgQ4YTTh6E2a6FNIHpU8NPRxt_KyWUZUSwrLf56tR2615K5w8jWk6kSxz6vJu2F8XG6gHIaZIQw5e3vWqGL7An3esQfpRfbuPpu0hx7PYsSc6v_de06bfK3BJMFQj3pHvxM8o9Cou0uIgMAj0il6d8An07Z3tIk8uiJIPLRWjdE-dFZgIhIqLRF0eU-HrEVrN3lxJXUjXk0pUfvUBMlILXK53vy0)
---
Yikes, I'm stunned! name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: Just Hours Left Before the May 16th Midnight Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Canepa for Assessor-County Clerk-Recorder 2026 committee, ID #1486383**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=acaabf4a72&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

I’m running for San Mateo County Assessor-County Clerk-Recorder & Chief Elections Officer to bring trusted leadership, accountability, and responsive public service to one of the county’s most important offices.

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=c5bdb77442&e=c0babbc643)

This office impacts residents every single day, from ensuring fair property assessments and maintaining vital public records to protecting secure, accessible, and transparent elections. I’m committed to modernizing operations, restoring public trust, and delivering the professionalism and service San Mateo County residents deserve.

[DONATE NOW](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=d962d53cfe&e=c0babbc643)

As a former Mayor and current member of the Board of Supervisors, I oversee a $5.5 billion organization with 5,800 employees and strong financial reserves. I understand the importance of transparency, sound management, and delivering reliable services that people can count on.
Now, with our critical May 16 fundraising deadline quickly approaching, I’m asking for your support.

Every contribution helps us expand voter outreach, share our message across San Mateo County, and build the grassroots campaign needed to win this important race. We cannot afford to slow down at this critical moment.

Please make a contribution today and help us keep our momentum strong:

[DONATE NOW](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=38260c0543&e=c0babbc643)

Thank you for your support, your encouragement, and your belief in leadership that puts San Mateo County residents first.

With gratitude,

David Canepa
San Mateo County Supervisor

P.S. The May 16th deadline is one of the most important moments of our campaign so far. Every donation made before midnight helps us reach more voters and build the momentum needed to win.

body:
| | | Hi folks, James Carville here.

Today's the day: The U.S. House primary in my state, the Great State of Louisiana... or at least, it woulda been, if the kooks in the GOP didn't postpone the primaries to redraw maps and rig their way to victory.

Really think about that. **Republicans canceled an election ‐‐ and _threw out_ votes already cast ‐‐ for political gain.**

Everything else was voted on today. Senate, ballot initiatives, whathaveyou -- but they cancelled the _House races specifically_ so they could go in, rig the maps, and screw over Black voters.

If that's not enough for folks to WAKE UP and sound the friggin' alarm, then _I don't know what the heck we're waitin' for._ And if we don't get fired up about the midterms _right now_ , we can kiss our biggest chance of putting a HUGE check on Trump goodbye.

**So rise and shine, 'cause we've got some work to do.** **[Chip in $7 _(matched to $21!)_ to help get Democrats across the nation the resources they need to win this November >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/23144?amount=7&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FD-20260516-James-CarvilleLAPrimaryGerrymandering-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260516-James-CarvilleLAPrimaryGerrymandering-Pros-sl1&akid=23875%2E9716520%2EikR5EX)**

clean_body: | | | Hi folks, James Carville here. Today's the day: The U.S. House primary in my state, the Great State of Louisiana... or at least, it woulda been, if the kooks in the GOP didn't postpone the primaries to redraw maps and rig their way to victory. Really think about that. Republicans canceled an election ‐‐ and threw out votes already cast ‐‐ for political gain. Everything else was voted on today. Senate, ballot initiatives, whathaveyou -- but they cancelled the House races specifically so they could go in, rig the maps, and screw over Black voters. If that's not enough for folks to WAKE UP and sound the friggin' alarm, then I don't know what the heck we're waitin' for. And if we don't get fired up about the midterms right now , we can kiss our biggest chance of putting a HUGE check on Trump goodbye. So rise and shine, 'cause we've got some work to do. | | If Republicans are cool with cancelling elections to cheat their way to victory -- and the Supreme Court just bent over backwards to let 'em! ‐‐ just imagine the pure HELL they've got in store for us if we fall short in the midterms. Do you think they'll stop at a few extra House seats, courtesy of Sam Alito and some funky-lookin' lines on a map? If Trump keeps his MAGA majority in the Senate and no one in power will tell him "no"? I sure as heck don't! I talked to the folks at the DSCC, and they launched an exclusive Triple-Impact Match to take back the Senate and finally put a check on this guy, but the match ends at midnight. Democrats can win the Senate, I know it, but we'll have to fight like hell to get there. If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | Thanks for reading. \- James Derivative of by JD Lasica. . | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. # [Remember Getting Your Vote Thrown Out?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=7534176&post_id=198073104&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk4MDczMTA0LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg5ODMyNzYsImV4cCI6MTc4MTU3NTI3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTc1MzQxNzYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aKqXqQ81pP38dcvWsWtLYh1NFjIdL8sLIBem95lcOzs)
### Let me be direct with you:
| | [Mike Cortese](https://substack.com/@mikefortennessee)
---
| May 17
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikefortennessee)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=7534176&post_id=198073104&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk4MDczMTA0LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg5ODMyNzYsImV4cCI6MTc4MTU3NTI3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTc1MzQxNzYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aKqXqQ81pP38dcvWsWtLYh1NFjIdL8sLIBem95lcOzs)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mikefortennessee/p/remember-getting-your-vote-thrown?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

On January 6th, 2021, while rioters were breaking windows and beating police officers in the United States Capitol, Scott DesJarlais watched. Then, hours later, with the smoke barely cleared and the blood still fresh, he voted to throw out the electoral votes of Arizona and Pennsylvania.
Not because the courts found fraud. They didn't. Over 60 lawsuits were filed. Over 60 were dismissed or rejected. Every major court in the country, including judges appointed by Republicans, looked at the evidence and found nothing.
**DesJarlais didn 't care. He voted to override you anyway. [I'm running a race against this kind of corruption, and need your help today!](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bf68b605-f152-449f-9d16-223e38232d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Different Day, Same Fight. HELP HERE🚨](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bf68b605-f152-449f-9d16-223e38232d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And before that, he had already signed onto a Supreme Court brief trying to invalidate the votes of Georgia, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. Millions of American voters, real people who stood in line, filled out their ballots, and trusted the process... and Scott DesJarlais tried to erase them with a legal stunt the Supreme Court threw out immediately.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/63ce757b-ad30-41e4-b809-9318fcaecac9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Think about what that means. This isn't a difference of opinion on tax policy or healthcare. This is a sitting congressman looking his constituents in the eye and saying: _the votes only count when my side wins._
That's not conservatism. That's not patriotism. That's cowardice dressed up in a flag pin.
I come from a different place. I believe the ballot box is sacred and when Tennesseans vote, those votes deserve to be counted and respected. Full stop, no legal maneuvers. No signing onto briefs because your party's leader demanded it.
DesJarlais has been in Washington for 14 years. In that time he's learned one thing really well: how to protect himself. He's learned how to sign the right briefs and keep the right people happy, even when it means telling the voters of this district that their voice only matters when it's convenient.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ad54f5ed-34c5-4f00-9433-90aec4c0f440?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Pitch in $20.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bf68b605-f152-449f-9d16-223e38232d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I'm running because Tennessee deserves better than a representative who treats democracy like a suggestion.
Your vote is not a bargaining chip. And I will never treat it like one.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Tonight is a big deal:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Dear Peter,
Our final fundraising deadline before June’s primary is tonight. With so many voters still undecided, _everyone_ will be looking to see the strength of this campaign.
Our team set a $250,000 goal to make sure the number we report after today is as big as possible. Can you use this custom link to chip in any amount that makes sense to you?
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20260516_3_ak?refcode=em20260516-41353&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260516_3_ak.AJ_i4h&refcode=em20260516-41353&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=41353%2E3422442%2ExaBG-X)**
**I want you to hear it from me: we can win this race.** If enough people chip in as little as $5 or as much as they can afford, we can overcome the millions my billionaire and far-right opponents are spending to defeat us.
Tonight’s deadline is a big deal for our campaign, and something the talking heads will use to compare our movement to the other candidates.
I’ve been on stage at debates and on the road with my whiteboard to meet with voters and rally support, but none of that would be possible without people like you standing with me over the past year.
In a state as large as California, grassroots support can make the difference between winning and losing. We only have a few weeks to get our message to the voters we need to win this race.
That’s why this goal is so important, and why I’d be honored to have your support. Donate $5 or any amount that makes sense to you before our midnight deadline.
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20260516_3_ak?refcode=em20260516-41353&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260516_3_ak.AJ_i4h&refcode=em20260516-41353&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=41353%2E3422442%2ExaBG-X)**
Thank you,
Katie

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=41353&t=3&akid=41353%2E3422442%2ExaBG-X)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=41353)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41353&t=4&akid=41353%2E3422442%2ExaBG-X)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026

Friend, when I made my first local endorsements more than a decade ago, it was because hardworking candidates needed a boost of credibility and volunteers. Over the last 10 years, I’ve backed more than 120 local candidates because building a strong Democratic bench starts in our local communities. I’m sharing this with you because this work is paying off, **and we need your help to scale it.** **[Can you chip in $10 now to help me bring New Mexicans the leadership that will strengthen our state and focus on the needs of working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131541778/621497616/1200775846?amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260516_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjcxMzJjNC1hMDUxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WL8LHx7SXv-P_i5znqqi2PrWdvhPRSHoVQe2WMAumjs=)** | [CHIP IN $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131541779/621497617/-1340403166?amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260516_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjcxMzJjNC1hMDUxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WL8LHx7SXv-P_i5znqqi2PrWdvhPRSHoVQe2WMAumjs=)

Being the “First Endorser” means jumping in early, lending credibility, and connecting candidates with the resources needed to win.
Whether it’s Juan de Jesus Sanchez reaching new voters, Amanda Lopez Askin protecting our elections, or Secretary Maggie Toulouse Oliver building local partnerships — _a stronger campaign strengthens them all._
The long-term stakes are simple: national power is built on strong local leadership.
When we invest early in municipal, county and state races, we protect our values — from defending public lands to making life more affordable for working families.

body:
We've been told for years now that sugar is the cause of all our problems. Weight gain. Digestive problems. Sluggishness. Insulin resistance and disease... More and more health experts put the blame on too much sugar in the diet for all these health issues, and more.| | | [](https://links.newsletter.marketdailypro.com/u/click?_t=7a28bbb892d5463fb7f7674bdc2d44f2&_m=70cd70390b254f689ccd6b214e1c5ee1&_e=_xgf7kbrEf5ucwUwhNI5V3AbsPpJaT_F96QwvIyGY02imwZksVumG4M6ubc0UrKRu1-Aj1bJVgMEkEDpa8p3gi-UKlMiA3H4QEmWkX21A6s-0gMKjc8f-vBQ9cypDdqqUyewQrRHNeFY-6D78TU_tXsx3m8LFSwHQ6ymkpJOU7gDm--__ETkIiojYX_nJYCwyjtUurV6NhiWvIo22z-rWegSooZOBTCHlyYWhMaiij7goVqoidk7366fVLIXPJqcG3j7YHcRlQX8dPJHwj9FD6aOh0FNaoVmnmj_uEdzUVlkz70IYK9lC6WT1-SYTjG2RX3eXJnFYFGtdxMl0DZCWw%3D%3D)

We've been told for years now that sugar is the cause of all our problems.

Weight gain. Digestive problems. Sluggishness. Insulin resistance and disease... More and more health experts put the blame on too much sugar in the diet for all these health issues, and more.

**However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — eliminating sugar isn't the answer to feeling good again.**

"About 75% of the food we eat has sugar added to it," says Dr. Gundry. "It's unrealistic to ask people to stop eating sugar."

Instead, he says he's discovered a way to fight back against the negative effects too much sugar has on the body - without having to stop eating it completely.

Consistent overconsumption of sugar can cause a problem known as "metabolic slowdown." Warning signs include unwanted belly flab, "brain fog", slower metabolism, tiredness, constipation, and even difficulty concentrating. **Metabolic slowdown currently affects tens of millions of Americans.**

Dr. Gundry explains, "Metabolic slowdown usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But the damage caused by sugar-laden foods is not normal."

The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home, with a method Dr. Gundry has developed himself. **"It's very simple. My technique is a way to help your body better process the sugar you eat, so that it's being used as energy - not stored as fat," he says.**

By revealing this relatively basic process, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of people make swift improvements.

People are also reporting **dramatically improved digestion, more energy, and feeling healthier than they have in years.** ✝ *

Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release a free informative video to the public showcasing exactly how his Metabolic Slowdown trick works- without extreme diets, and enjoying the foods you love to eat, guilt-free.✝*

"My mission is to help everyday Americans achieve good health," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled." In fact, he's evenlost 70lbs himself!*

The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on various social media platforms, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.

[Click here to watch the presentation:](https://links.newsletter.marketdailypro.com/u/click?_t=7a28bbb892d5463fb7f7674bdc2d44f2&_m=70cd70390b254f689ccd6b214e1c5ee1&_e=_xgf7kbrEf5ucwUwhNI5V5erVu6OafU6qB1Df1GE8-R_Q-DK200Ghz9E1lnv7KJWDuKre1CZWDGxJsR-yYBfaZtspM1HkgmOwIXVDdrT2VttLENHURnOoYi9TMjeSBKASjHwl-S99_U1bO7TKV4MqfWlgBMIniITMAMAtC3PunZcS7tOSu6kQXQ3dUELCgHxdz5TK4lFXeNOJXdi09tsuhrPp-ptH2NMlIJcz3s0TVdvtpOTKFzG3Kx9T_GVBpzUb2A-bAEAoM_lqsnIgXcJXS1sMSO8v313vQrLgdSsU8EQhBkePqQmn-APZuZTwG_BkOE6lJQwMDOwV1gA6sbV2jrNDHnOpeOeWKeH3T4KSomz50YyYEIIt-OglnL_9w0qTsadjVV-X5dg03qpQ7Ao9w0HzwAttJq2MYTmomeuyGlP1zYvUD3lviVSjBtowwOXFW8Lfn44PteeZZVD7zDLWdzLXlpnuKxzmb8AhrIxBQqPHqRIT1bysYIE7K5NY94wjSXGUyM9yMOOrfhXsB4wUmlbM05JElaxibyNRrVT4N95hDkLinDnfu1g9bnIXSisTEVKCL7RiVvCiISiPWMPqQ%3D%3D)

[Watch The Video](https://links.newsletter.marketdailypro.com/u/click?_t=7a28bbb892d5463fb7f7674bdc2d44f2&_m=70cd70390b254f689ccd6b214e1c5ee1&_e=_xgf7kbrEf5ucwUwhNI5V5erVu6OafU6qB1Df1GE8-R_Q-DK200Ghz9E1lnv7KJWDuKre1CZWDGxJsR-yYBfaZtspM1HkgmOwIXVDdrT2VttLENHURnOoYi9TMjeSBKASjHwl-S99_U1bO7TKV4MqfWlgBMIniITMAMAtC3PunZzqUEot5zj1IK-tfbH6A7RGnIAwIFe_NXm_urBp76Qu1nM0wec8rorGJ2868zhExySOg_xJV6kmRCv0LZiNz7Sh29hp3fEC1QswWxAy4gRFWfDxaEtWloWtKG6-eey0MFYEUUH6OT0mwg4w2eZaRvpqkEYjkTe5a-qkuMMZaCQwlRq9ARvzk_5Xw89mfxfCXUinQLJxkIb8QUG26QZfpS_lasSHqEiDKdgd9E5UBL1RlaCPVHVLEean9W5io4fVaPh52ZsBLwl_Gtu-7UQCc4ejPTlowbJRWCJozXYTWkmK7JXEXDs2ZFZZUXwWJfgqWfJRRq89I0EizlZGqW6gy8mLIr-eEqv3JP-qmpX8w0Iz250fIYI8UrgaDjxUtvvf59o00kbkykC-yWBDuXkhTz1XdcBnxp1f62zCfChNiad9A%3D%3D)

Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities.

Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, the late Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives.

Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease occasional gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff joint discomfort," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible."✝

clean_body: We've been told for years now that sugar is the cause of all our problems. Weight gain. Digestive problems. Sluggishness. Insulin resistance and disease... More and more health experts put the blame on too much sugar in the diet for all these health issues, and more.| | | | | | | | We've been told for years now that sugar is the cause of all our problems. Weight gain. Digestive problems. Sluggishness. Insulin resistance and disease... More and more health experts put the blame on too much sugar in the diet for all these health issues, and more. However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — eliminating sugar isn't the answer to feeling good again. "About 75% of the food we eat has sugar added to it," says Dr. Gundry. "It's unrealistic to ask people to stop eating sugar." Instead, he says he's discovered a way to fight back against the negative effects too much sugar has on the body - without having to stop eating it completely. Consistent overconsumption of sugar can cause a problem known as "metabolic slowdown." Warning signs include unwanted belly flab, "brain fog", slower metabolism, tiredness, constipation, and even difficulty concentrating. Metabolic slowdown currently affects tens of millions of Americans. Dr. Gundry explains, "Metabolic slowdown usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But the damage caused by sugar-laden foods is not normal." The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home, with a method Dr. Gundry has developed himself. "It's very simple. My technique is a way to help your body better process the sugar you eat, so that it's being used as energy - not stored as fat," he says. By revealing this relatively basic process, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of people make swift improvements. People are also reporting dramatically improved digestion, more energy, and feeling healthier than they have in years. ✝ Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release a free informative video to the public showcasing exactly how his Metabolic Slowdown trick works- without extreme diets, and enjoying the foods you love to eat, guilt-free.✝ "My mission is to help everyday Americans achieve good health," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled." In fact, he's evenlost 70lbs himself! The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on various social media platforms, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS. Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities. Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, the late Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives. Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease occasional gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff joint discomfort," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible."✝ Individual results may vary. ✝ These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

See link below)_ Holy shit, what the f*** did the village idiot do to the reflecting pool? And the White House? And WTF, a huge arch blocking the Lincoln Memorial? [**Make him stop.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd8ce3ab-d101-478d-bbeb-030590835e7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The president is elected to do the job of president, not to just rip down and build shit however he feels like on a random day. Is he going to start showing up at houses, and randomly rip down walls? Add some fingerpaint "improvements" to the Mona Lisa? **This is not his job. He doesn't get to do it. Especially since he's an idiot with zero taste, so the shit he is doing is incredibly stupid. ** Make him stop. There are already uniformed officers close to these things who are there to stop wackos from doing wacko things. If I started taking a whiz on the Washington Monument, I'd be stopped and arrested before the second drop hit the marble. Do the same to Trump. He's a president, not a king. Yes, he can be arrested and punished for this stuff. Seems weird to arrest a president? Well, we live in weird times. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: Do you see this HORRIFYING AI-guided laser strike?| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | Do you see this China didn’t expect this — and neither did Wall Street. | The Pentagon just escalated. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1792, 24 stockbrokers and merchants met under a buttonwood tree and signed the so-called Buttonwood Agreement, establishing the rules for trading in the first incarnation of the [New York Stock Exchange](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D-u3CAQgPHT2B0WjP8XFGncvbQpLRYGPFkMK5is17ePkiu8C3yf9Pv1tX8ZipTCT3OiZp_3hFeNyIxl96YyVg4lX5SCJSasf2r1eQcJk5CjUPPuDMV7H1qnPSJg36JW87xKBf26todWK9ilXx3Yx6NXaGAFMH6cJrAKjZ9a0v9qclSzknLql87DMM6LG7ztp8WNqhkkOuJcut-ZEh_o453fWDqbzzbqg_lVm_5HA1sD23VdXboPqpzL3eUSGtjwc9CDmHKqDWxsTkpBcDEOSxW5UKBURcJL3Lk8ReVsnwI_9jApYFu0e10UI9VpbgYZTkPx_5m_xfXW8DcAAP__PJiCSw). Tupperware began simply as a line of food containers in the mid-20th century before taking hold in American suburbs with the lure of parties, status, and income. Over time, however, cultural shifts made the products less appealing, as seen in ["Whatever Happened To..."](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVssvnEGhkpVtnRppbYTwnCxqYiJzE1Q3r5KX6HrOdJv-H-e3dnnkrflzV_AYqpug94KIMLukm8IDZe99rwtIWOGdmstVccp1weqDsy46HN5ODlEmwA4iAEsM-ZIGRfH47Ba41WKs1ZBBdCUUQA6a28kgAKpp3nI9qlRxQyjVItpTFwqM0WZgtBTVIxICjFj3cefmjdcIZVHvcM-hnoZil0Rr42IF8JPhJ967-Oj3vA2w_N_Lh7DSsTpTsTr-4cD-nX-FlMfdhuvPZeSmzZE0uXic_kj8V8d7pb_BgAA___Kc3HJ) In case you missed it, this week on _The Flyover Podcast_ , Ayla Brown shared three simple habits researchers say may help keep your brain sharp as you age. Scientists believe small everyday choices could play a bigger role in long-term cognitive health than many people realize. [Listen here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz0tOwzAQANDTOLtG_sRxsvACCWVF2SGWlj_jdJAbV_G0JbdHcAUu8KT3eXZnjwW39d1fwVKuboNnK0AEu8u-ETRa9_rEbY1ICO3eWq5OcjmeuD4J45LHcrihSzYDSFAdWGHMzIVU89xdrA4xaTBBhDFoPQNP0nuljFdzHqLmHdpfjWthBOejmvosB22mNOSoxilpwQYOCanu_VfFjS6Qy1EfsPexXrtiL0S3xtQLkwuTy1HvdO8DMLl8fAeI89vi1omphZh6VcJ0u023J5aCbTRs4OvVY_mT6F_9h5U_AQAA__9Ou22F). ## Supreme Court Rejects Virginia Redistricting Map
The Supreme Court on Friday [rejected Virginia's bid](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQhZ_G7oj4sQ0UFNuku9tuaRFmcGaFjQWTRPftV95XuOXRkY7O9_35Wr8iFTq233HHwLmuB356QWZsa46dsfPW6oeOLRET9lfvua5a6kXIWSi7QqTyvU4jhIyo0YwYlLVeKm28H58BZkg4Gx-9c0o5BADUEAFtlkpGOVK41uSsrJJyMe6W9TRbB1NOZnEwq2GSCMS13f5WOviJuXzXN7ZbqvtYwpP57IP5Nej7oO_xvACu6gqNKRUc9L2_zoY7ilRfjcWb2kYHRdEQqHOjxHRsAnCvqUXuouH5ehRK8egiAxjzcD4m7VPWTi7Zepn9Q-sL2I8twPmhUqgvdpjktkcq_7_xj4S-g_4XAAD___8QjMI) to restore a congressional map that would have given Democrats a chance to pick up four seats in the closely divided House of Representatives. Without any noted dissents, the justices declined to block a split decision from Virginia's top court that Democrats didn't follow the proper procedures in sending their proposal to voters. Democrats [hoped to enact a favorable 10-1 design](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O3CAUxfGnwR0jvmzsgiKNu02b0mLgYt8VBguuZ7RvH23yCFv_pHOk_5-P7cNjxrL_9ic4SnUr8O4ZiKBtyXeCTnurbyx7QELod--pbkqoiYuRS7tFj_lrM0N0CUCBHsBJaxchlV6W4XBhkcbAU-tgnn7WcZLBRh39AmkSNoYB3feaGKWVQkx6fiRlRjtHk4Ke5jhKZgREpNoenxULHZDyV31Be4R6DtkdRFdn-hdTK1MrHXBgzt_G1Npgv7MnrIWpNdS7EX96ogydqXWcZzGPgvf7anAC_-8NPiFQ5y9sOxb0PNSyN-gda_GZn_5iah2ai9cbc8Y-WWbEfnr89znQjyK-nPobAAD__x2eiNY) that would add four pickup opportunities in the battle for the House in November. ## US, Nigerian Forces Kill ISIS Leader
U.S. and Nigerian forces [killed a leader of the Islamic State group](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDtuwzAQRE8jdTL4FaWCRRp3TptSWJFLeRPqA3Jtw7cPlCukHAwwmPe-btMNKNO2fMKKntM-bfiqGZmxTAkqY-Wl7C_alkBMWB-1pn1SQvWdsJ10UwTK78m00SdEhbpFL50bhVR6HNu772MUs9AyDXGUJoWg0jxLGI0dbZBpaMmfa8JKJ4Xo9XBJylg3RJOC7odoZWMERuK9XL532viOKb_3J5ZL2Nc2-zvzURv90ahro65wnABndYbCFDI26srlsR4d1Qwrha4yMHYbLVgIOsgr0Pb4oQ6FBQA5OxROaDeriHa0JmltpTRRtMXH40U5U-1dY8SyAuW_G_wvd0-vfgMAAP__USeC9w) in Nigeria in a mission on Saturday. A spokesman for the Nigerian military task force said the mission was a "highly complex precision air-land operation" and was carried out during three hours of darkness early Saturday without any casualties or loss of assets. President Donald Trump identified Abu Bakr al-Mainuki as the [second-in-command of the Islamic State group](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SpCAUhZ8GMyy8CLYBwSZms-mGFsrFvjNX6BIcq_fpt9xXmOwEp87P9-dj_vDElLbffkdXY54TXoWxVjzm6EvFUrcjX5S2lSphOUuJeQYFVioju2EOnvg9901wERFQN-i6YRhVB3ocm6fDaC2AskYbXNZRx3FYlF10NKCWEPuG3J2mTDd0Sln9aCP0ZniEPq7aPoLpRK8wUM1H-5kp1SdGfudvPNo17w27Z62vIvQvAZOA6bqu1vOn_4t4-NshYLovCZjuGgGTETB1t6jHub9k8e8iqRDLgmtOQVKSa953n4L0yykXYs_Ss9wpnV8kv4gZQ3O48LqImYodRK-23RP_H1R_RPHbwb8AAAD__9xnhts) globally and the senior leader of the administrative body that provides "operational guidance and funding around the world." U.S. Africa Command's initial assessment indicated that multiple terrorists, [including other senior ISIS leaders](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u4yAUQOHV4A6LPwMuKKZxl2mntIi5OHcGQwQkKLsfvbeFt4FzpO_Pbb95TJjP3_4C12PZM4yWoHeoe_StQ-tnLQPzeWBHaK_WYtkFE5qyhXKzB4_ps6spuAggQE7guDEr40Ku6_RwKngbVx3UqvXBDuat4XcRVWQrRC_thO6rxhZuOGNa2jkKtRgbVDyktmHhRDEI2Eud_xbM_QExfcob6nyUa0ru0fuzEfmLiI2IbYwx-1jxKNd8YSJie1ZorUIC34CITepFWyI2bNhofl13qLSPQv9hShAoZprxhIp-qi48B6aETRui2Hl5TN_P_iOotxP_AwAA__82AH4G), were killed in the operation.
## List: Fastest-Growing Cities in the US
Celina, Texas--north of Dallas-- is the fastest-growing city in the United States, with a 24.6% growth rate, according to [data from the U.S. Census Bureau](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunTAMhp8mbDkyBk5gYKhUZbtdOyLfxDmkykkQMZfy9hX3FTp5sf1___f7Y_mgmGJ-_aI3zxLKkvmsiUV4XwJV4SqvvZwxv1yUyPWoNZQFAZ8aBt2axVNM19I3fg7MyF3Dc2vMBC1209Ss8wRuICI25Cj40YzBOPM5Qj-2DicITZzvbzC0pgV4duMjYD-Y0ffBdc_RD63qgX2Usj_-lJhl5ZCu8sX7w5V3k-ZVZKuq-6HQKrTneT6OSlI8XfeCQlul7JdCeze7B0ksWaG9YxVaGBTatldohf9S1b68Yybhqo-qt7Id6ftA3xpk1TFrBBy041yPqj0JKbQTgBnGrgcwN0dn5XPnoLqf69bss9_OmFKsT6N6eL0ppm92-S_hXzP-CwAA__8YZpM4). Texas dominated the latest population rankings, with all five of the nation's fastest-growing cities, including four clustered in the suburbs of the Dallas-Fort Worth area. Charlotte, North Carolina, experienced [the largest numeric increase](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2unTAQRldjOiP_YHwpXKShe2lTIgePYSKDkWce6O4-utlCNvB955xfX8tXxILn9jMeEDjX5YSHCjBDW3IkBuKt1QfPbUVGoG-iXBejzCiVk9ovKWJ5L0OXQgYwYDsI2vtJaWOnqduDS867KUJK3mo3aAdmtfm3znYatY-6w_BZU057rdRoX302g_OvNOTVjq_ktBgUJOTa-j8VT94hl3e9ofVrPboSduaLhP0hzCzM_DxPv8JJ39Rv9RZm_vi0Wg9h5qsBkWxQIBKQMPPnWJj5xpPjBtIo4-SK_JZcn1Ne9ZJAjEdkoH7no3QtpOvBUpBGLwa1HRHLPwz-r3Z3MH8DAAD__0pYhD0) in the U.S. in 2025, adding more than 20,000 residents. The South claimed 10 of the country's 15 fastest-growing cities, while growth slowdowns in the nation's largest cities were most pronounced in the Northeast.

**Whatever happened to Tupperware?** Tupperware was never just a food container. For a few decades after World War II, it was practically a symbol of American life. The company emerged in the late 1940s, when inventor Earl Tupper developed lightweight plastic containers with airtight "burping" seals that felt futuristic in an age still dominated by glass jars and wax paper. The products were genuinely impressive by the standards of the day: durable, lightweight, leak-resistant, and far better at preserving food than many existing storage options. But the real breakthrough came from Brownie Wise, a charismatic saleswoman who realized the product worked best not on store shelves, but in living rooms, and the Tupperware party was born. [Here's a TV commercial for one](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVssvnEGhkpVtnRppbYTwnCxqYiJzE1Q3r5KX6HrOdJv-H-e3dnnkrflzV_AYqpug94KIMLukm8IDZe99rwtIWOGdmstVccp1weqDsy46HN5ODlEmwA4iAEsM-ZIGRfH47Ba41WKs1ZBBdCUUQA6a28kgAKpp3nI9qlRxQyjVItpTFwqM0WZgtBTVIxICjFj3cefmjdcIZVHvcM-hnoZil0Rr42IF8JPhJ967-Oj3vA2w_N_Lh7DSsTpTsTr-4cD-nX-FlMfdhuvPZeSmzZE0uXic_kj8V8d7pb_BgAA___Kc3HJ). From the 1950s through the 1980s, Tupperware parties were a cultural phenomenon--part social event, part shopping spree, part escape from household routine. Women would gather on Tuesday evenings, admiring the latest designs: [the iconic Wonderlier bowls](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUr2S2yAQfhrc2QO74q9QkRuNu0ubUoPFSuIOCQVxVpynz4jUqdLtfn98DPx4799diGGdvruF2jKmfqVjj1QK5X50e6G9TDkdYZ2GUALtX_s-ph44qCuXV6F770J89c3FtyMREF6oFVpbLgCtvcxtw8GT1LLh5Lwl5yV3DVlq3MNwC-4S2jONS6EF5wrNbYRGauObcUBlvBSs4eRDSfn2kcJaZhrjKz0p34a0XGI7l7LtDL8xuDO4H8dxc4v7ndaTZnDfGd4_GXZHWj3lGCgzeHukI-4M3srXtlE-XCYGyvkpb8Ez7ISxAoXUWivLQM1P5yuutZVGaq5R6op7ejLshjrTry2uDDtet5iGbX4x7CwHY6ys4ErlYNhNdUlD-KipEoUAFMZaoY3gaFVzvVbJz6Uw7KjO2a3_EFe6uDzVtM_DXxFBolBc6b8Hv7zzQz4vdup7gSjBNLw3Vp5tl6E6OYLVFrmgx4CCG4MODY3QKGW9E8BAFTed_VOa5pfPVzjdmUaG3eb7PfYQH9uwzDGpni659dsRYgy70qzh0-JCrG9W_uujPVv4EwAA__8p_dW5), the Jel-Ring mold for fancy Jell-O, the Cake Taker that every mom coveted. In an era of expanding suburbs and isolated homemakers, the parties offered something bigger than kitchenware. They created community, status, and, for many women, a rare chance at independent income. Tupperware became a cultural institution because it perfectly matched postwar America: optimistic, consumer-driven, convenience-obsessed, and fascinated by plastic as the material of the future. But the culture that sustained Tupperware slowly disappeared. As more women entered the workforce, daytime home parties faded. Big-box retail and later e-commerce made direct sales feel unnecessary. Cheap competitors flooded the market. Plastic itself lost its glamorous image and became associated with waste and pollution. By the 2020s, Tupperware had become more of a nostalgia brand than a cultural force. The company filed for bankruptcy protection in 2024 before reorganizing under new ownership as "The New Tupperware Co." Today, it is trying to reinvent itself as a leaner digital-era brand, selling products online and through its remaining network of independent consultants in selected global markets. Still, the brand left a remarkable imprint on American culture. Today, those vintage pastel bowls [are collector's items on eBay](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykk81u4zYQx5-Gvtkghx-SDj7YVowE2yyaoNhs9yLQJCXTokSBZEw4T19IdlH00ktv_M9gZn7zwY_X5lVaZ8fuuxzMNrW-GU2OzqRkQtPKmExMXfDZjp2yyZr4GWPrG8Ag1pivSdFoad2tYSu9bY0BQ1dmS4qiwgRoVa3O2wqbEym5wEK3p1NZiKrinKvWSA4GGF7Z7ZwNc1IQjAUtNy0wXpSatYqKUnOCGDbaJh82F2_HdDatu_mrCRvlh5XbnlOaIqI7BEcEx5zzxpzkbXYiOEZ1RnC0m3MaHKLHZuwzovXVjkl2BsE-fU6TCVmGWSAQTZRKJkRrPIs2-AHR-p0tKoU-Wo1oPQGljAPbDLzAG0cooQhEJ3UT_WdQBtGaIBDOK0TrCkNZVhyBGPp0m2YnAhFtMm7s72Ly9v5Qw9SNc3RZVKQSBYY5T3BRJhk6M3PpKNfACK8Yp7wiVTlXNr5ZwBCI0aTsw5y4W0pGtXgIhgeiksMkbTfezf8q1Cm3WA-X_O2wu2T-6-fb_rzXTzbvXvjPHx_qcnl-G-Iz_I6n9RP_1R8bPf1Je_7xrF5-fDsc3t4Vfe92bl19ifD63V--6nd_-O2jfNtd62afnxamO9IM1Hj9XwvJftQmOGsCgv3JZxcR7EeT5z59mG_gMerXP5qX-j4AqScf_352wX9O904ZCEYqXFImZgiZ1PmfdciTenkMsDe37MNDDH1YogtC1oRTURRrygTDZM3mdQU3IVoLTgAzzAkvoEEgtLna5QjUKmz1lK1zNooCMdwN0rrlbNP_-mvXLfwVAAD__3NTJ5A). The parties are gone, but somewhere in your kitchen, there's probably still a butter-yellow Tupperware container--lid missing, of course--that refuses to die. _Were you a fan of Tupperware, or did you ever attend a Tupperware party? () | Whatever happened to Tupperware? Tupperware was never just a food container. For a few decades after World War II, it was practically a symbol of American life. The company emerged in the late 1940s, when inventor Earl Tupper developed lightweight plastic containers with airtight "burping" seals that felt futuristic in an age still dominated by glass jars and wax paper. The products were genuinely impressive by the standards of the day: durable, lightweight, leak-resistant, and far better at preserving food than many existing storage options. But the real breakthrough came from Brownie Wise, a charismatic saleswoman who realized the product worked best not on store shelves, but in living rooms, and the Tupperware party was born. . From the 1950s through the 1980s, Tupperware parties were a cultural phenomenon--part social event, part shopping spree, part escape from household routine. Women would gather on Tuesday evenings, admiring the latest designs: , the Jel-Ring mold for fancy Jell-O, the Cake Taker that every mom coveted. In an era of expanding suburbs and isolated homemakers, the parties offered something bigger than kitchenware. They created community, status, and, for many women, a rare chance at independent income. Tupperware became a cultural institution because it perfectly matched postwar America: optimistic, consumer-driven, convenience-obsessed, and fascinated by plastic as the material of the future. But the culture that sustained Tupperware slowly disappeared. As more women entered the workforce, daytime home parties faded. Big-box retail and later e-commerce made direct sales feel unnecessary. Cheap competitors flooded the market. Plastic itself lost its glamorous image and became associated with waste and pollution. By the 2020s, Tupperware had become more of a nostalgia brand than a cultural force. The company filed for bankruptcy protection in 2024 before reorganizing under new ownership as "The New Tupperware Co." Today, it is trying to reinvent itself as a leaner digital-era brand, selling products online and through its remaining network of independent consultants in selected global markets. Still, the brand left a remarkable imprint on American culture. Today, those vintage pastel bowls . The parties are gone, but somewhere in your kitchen, there's probably still a butter-yellow Tupperware container--lid missing, of course--that refuses to die. Were you a fan of Tupperware, or did you ever attend a Tupperware party? name: Andrew Sypher, Turning Point USA
subject: We don’t have enough of these right now
body:
We have more students stepping up than we can fully support at the moment.

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcuOnTAMhp8m7DjKhZCTBYuqCKmLmW2XyMcxEBUSmgvz-hXTeYHZWfbnT7L_32_zG_jdh_UdDhrw8nPK8we5GMoGF1GIdd3iUjbKlPwsuexbrlthbk40bkDXK9nQIIyxXEgrbLMNvaal7zonZI8K7KszCrkkFMJ2QlrV-OE2cS2M4EIL83jCUy-IWr4cogDOOl5PB4XyA2PIlC4o_iIfQryrGB4Yj2YftlLOzNQPJicmp0xYEz0gkIvlJpicSk3Bh7U9ow-lrRmYnIzVy0sbai1Z1XbkoLVEqoXluSyaBPUETE051oQ0Y3TE1Pjz17vgynDNZF_LMR_kfD2YGukAv381_68wNW6QHOQ_M-DfrxHCcYJfA1NjOWuGGbD4y-fj86tNGtz54ffd596wjq-39PPI8v1YrkH-CwAA__8wv5yP)
---
| | Friend,
---
I want to give you a picture of what's really happening right now -- not the polished version, but what it actually looks like on the ground.

Inside our office, tables are covered in supplies and open boxes. Coworkers are coming together, packing materials, sealing kits, and sending them out the door as fast as possible.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcuOnTAMhp8m7DjKhZCTBYuqCKmLmW2XyMcxEBUSmgvz-hXTeYHZWfbnT7L_32_zG_jdh_UdDhrw8nPK8we5GMoGF1GIdd3iUjbKlPwsuexbrlthbk40bkDXK9nQIIyxXEgrbLMNvaal7zonZI8K7KszCrkkFMJ2QlrV-OE2cS2M4EIL83jCUy-IWr4cogDOOl5PB4XyA2PIlC4o_iIfQryrGB4Yj2YftlLOzNQPJicmp0xYEz0gkIvlJpicSk3Bh7U9ow-lrRmYnIzVy0sbai1Z1XbkoLVEqoXluSyaBPUETE051oQ0Y3TE1Pjz17vgynDNZF_LMR_kfD2YGukAv381_68wNW6QHOQ_M-DfrxHCcYJfA1NjOWuGGbD4y-fj86tNGtz54ffd596wjq-39PPI8v1YrkH-CwAA__8wv5yP)
---
_Above: Activism kits bound for new chapters being packed with Constitutions, chapter handbooks, American flags, and more at TPUSA HQ in Arizona_
---
These boxes aren't sitting around waiting for someone to need them.

They're already claimed. And we don't have extras.

By the time one batch goes out, more requests come in.

Different schools, different students, same situation -- they want to start something, and they're asking us to help them do it.

That's where things stand right now.

We have more students stepping up than we can fully support at the moment.

And I don't say that lightly.

Because for years, the challenge wasn't getting students the tools -- it was getting them to speak up at all. Most kept their heads down.

The Left has spent years trying to convince this generation to sit down, stay quiet, and be ashamed of their country and everything that makes it great.

And for a long time, it worked. But that's all changing.

Now, we're seeing students stand up and push back.

**We saw it clearly at Wheeling High School in the Chicago suburbs -- Charlie's alma mater. **

For the first time, students there launched a Club America chapter. It took months to get approved, but a chapter is finally there.

And now, students are standing outside with signs about free markets and freedom -- not because it's easy, but because they've decided it matters more than staying quiet.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcuOnTAMhp8m7DjKhZCTBYuqCKmLmW2XyMcxEBUSmgvz-hXTeYHZWfbnT7L_32_zG_jdh_UdDhrw8nPK8we5GMoGF1GIdd3iUjbKlPwsuexbrlthbk40bkDXK9nQIIyxXEgrbLMNvaal7zonZI8K7KszCrkkFMJ2QlrV-OE2cS2M4EIL83jCUy-IWr4cogDOOl5PB4XyA2PIlC4o_iIfQryrGB4Yj2YftlLOzNQPJicmp0xYEz0gkIvlJpicSk3Bh7U9ow-lrRmYnIzVy0sbai1Z1XbkoLVEqoXluSyaBPUETE051oQ0Y3TE1Pjz17vgynDNZF_LMR_kfD2YGukAv381_68wNW6QHOQ_M-DfrxHCcYJfA1NjOWuGGbD4y-fj86tNGtz54ffd596wjq-39PPI8v1YrkH-CwAA__8wv5yP)
---
That's not something you can just manufacture. But it is something you can support when it happens.

And it's not isolated growth anymore.

**We 're now working with more than 1,450 college chapters and over 3,400 high school chapters across the country. That's real scale. **

But if you zoom out, there are roughly 27,000 high schools in America.

That means tens of thousands of campuses where the Left still dominates the conversation...

And where students are waiting for someone to help them stand up and speak.

So as much as this has grown, we're still in the early innings of what Charlie actually set out to build.

What's different now is the pace.

**Many states are moving to bring Club America chapters to every high school statewide, including: **

✅ Arkansas
✅ Florida
✅ Idaho
✅ Indiana
✅ Montana
✅ Nebraska
✅ Oklahoma
✅ South Carolina
✅ Texas
✅ Tennessee

That brings us to ten states now taking this seriously -- not just talk, but action.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcuOnTAMhp8m7DjKhZCTBYuqCKmLmW2XyMcxEBUSmgvz-hXTeYHZWfbnT7L_32_zG_jdh_UdDhrw8nPK8we5GMoGF1GIdd3iUjbKlPwsuexbrlthbk40bkDXK9nQIIyxXEgrbLMNvaal7zonZI8K7KszCrkkFMJ2QlrV-OE2cS2M4EIL83jCUy-IWr4cogDOOl5PB4XyA2PIlC4o_iIfQryrGB4Yj2YftlLOzNQPJicmp0xYEz0gkIvlJpicSk3Bh7U9ow-lrRmYnIzVy0sbai1Z1XbkoLVEqoXluSyaBPUETE051oQ0Y3TE1Pjz17vgynDNZF_LMR_kfD2YGukAv381_68wNW6QHOQ_M-DfrxHCcYJfA1NjOWuGGbD4y-fj86tNGtz54ffd596wjq-39PPI8v1YrkH-CwAA__8wv5yP)
---
That kind of expansion doesn't happen slowly.

It stacks quickly -- and it creates pressure behind the scenes to keep up.

Because every new chapter, every new student leader, every new school means more materials, more support, more follow-through.

And right now, that's where we're stretched.

We're not lacking interest or momentum.

We're working to keep up with both.

_So here 's how you can help... _

Right now, there are students ready to step up -- they just need the tools to do it.

**An activism kit puts everything they need directly into their hands: **

✅ Constitutions.
✅ Chapter guides.
✅ Flags.
✅ Materials to organize and lead.

It turns a student who wants to speak up... _into one who actually does. _

And you'll make it possible for us to keep saying yes when a student reaches out and says, "I want to start something here."

**[Each activism kit costs $25 to pack and ship to a student chapter. Will you put one into a student's hands today?](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcuOnTAMhp8m7DjKhZCTBYuqCKmLmW2XyMcxEBUSmgvz-hXTeYHZWfbnT7L_32_zG_jdh_UdDhrw8nPK8we5GMoGF1GIdd3iUjbKlPwsuexbrlthbk40bkDXK9nQIIyxXEgrbLMNvaal7zonZI8K7KszCrkkFMJ2QlrV-OE2cS2M4EIL83jCUy-IWr4cogDOOl5PB4XyA2PIlC4o_iIfQryrGB4Yj2YftlLOzNQPJicmp0xYEz0gkIvlJpicSk3Bh7U9ow-lrRmYnIzVy0sbai1Z1XbkoLVEqoXluSyaBPUETE051oQ0Y3TE1Pjz17vgynDNZF_LMR_kfD2YGukAv381_68wNW6QHOQ_M-DfrxHCcYJfA1NjOWuGGbD4y-fj86tNGtz54ffd596wjq-39PPI8v1YrkH-CwAA__8wv5yP)**

Every activism kit you help sponsor means one more student is ready to lead instead of sitting on the sidelines.

That's how we keep saying "yes" when the next student steps forward.

That's how this movement actually scales.

Because the reality is, the demand is here now.

The only question is whether we're equipped to meet it.

And that comes down to whether people like you decide to step in and help carry this forward.

**[Please commit to sending an activism kit to a conservative student today-- and help us keep building a generation that's willing to stand up and fight for this country.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcuOnTAMhp8m7DjKhZCTBYuqCKmLmW2XyMcxEBUSmgvz-hXTeYHZWfbnT7L_32_zG_jdh_UdDhrw8nPK8we5GMoGF1GIdd3iUjbKlPwsuexbrlthbk40bkDXK9nQIIyxXEgrbLMNvaal7zonZI8K7KszCrkkFMJ2QlrV-OE2cS2M4EIL83jCUy-IWr4cogDOOl5PB4XyA2PIlC4o_iIfQryrGB4Yj2YftlLOzNQPJicmp0xYEz0gkIvlJpicSk3Bh7U9ow-lrRmYnIzVy0sbai1Z1XbkoLVEqoXluSyaBPUETE051oQ0Y3TE1Pjz17vgynDNZF_LMR_kfD2YGukAv381_68wNW6QHOQ_M-DfrxHCcYJfA1NjOWuGGbD4y-fj86tNGtz54ffd596wjq-39PPI8v1YrkH-CwAA__8wv5yP)**

One final thing: I also wanted to say thank you.

If you've supported Turning Point USA before -- whether once or many times -- you've already played a role in building what you're seeing right now.

Students finding their voice. More state partnerships. New TPUSA chapters like the one at Charlie's former high school.

This kind of momentum doesn't happen without people willing to stand behind it.

And we don't take that lightly.

I appreciate you taking the time to read this, and for everything you've already done to support this work.
---
| | **For Charlie,** **Andrew Sypher** Chief Field OfficerTurning Point USA

clean_body: We have more students stepping up than we can fully support at the moment. | | | | | Friend, I want to give you a picture of what's really happening right now -- not the polished version, but what it actually looks like on the ground. Inside our office, tables are covered in supplies and open boxes. Coworkers are coming together, packing materials, sealing kits, and sending them out the door as fast as possible. Above: Activism kits bound for new chapters being packed with Constitutions, chapter handbooks, American flags, and more at TPUSA HQ in Arizona These boxes aren't sitting around waiting for someone to need them. They're already claimed. And we don't have extras. By the time one batch goes out, more requests come in. Different schools, different students, same situation -- they want to start something, and they're asking us to help them do it. That's where things stand right now. We have more students stepping up than we can fully support at the moment. And I don't say that lightly. Because for years, the challenge wasn't getting students the tools -- it was getting them to speak up at all. Most kept their heads down. The Left has spent years trying to convince this generation to sit down, stay quiet, and be ashamed of their country and everything that makes it great. And for a long time, it worked. But that's all changing. Now, we're seeing students stand up and push back. We saw it clearly at Wheeling High School in the Chicago suburbs -- Charlie's alma mater. For the first time, students there launched a Club America chapter. It took months to get approved, but a chapter is finally there. And now, students are standing outside with signs about free markets and freedom -- not because it's easy, but because they've decided it matters more than staying quiet. That's not something you can just manufacture. But it is something you can support when it happens. And it's not isolated growth anymore. We 're now working with more than 1,450 college chapters and over 3,400 high school chapters across the country. That's real scale. But if you zoom out, there are roughly 27,000 high schools in America. That means tens of thousands of campuses where the Left still dominates the conversation... And where students are waiting for someone to help them stand up and speak. So as much as this has grown, we're still in the early innings of what Charlie actually set out to build. What's different now is the pace. Many states are moving to bring Club America chapters to every high school statewide, including: ✅ Arkansas ✅ Florida ✅ Idaho ✅ Indiana ✅ Montana ✅ Nebraska ✅ Oklahoma ✅ South Carolina ✅ Texas ✅ Tennessee That brings us to ten states now taking this seriously -- not just talk, but action. That kind of expansion doesn't happen slowly. It stacks quickly -- and it creates pressure behind the scenes to keep up. Because every new chapter, every new student leader, every new school means more materials, more support, more follow-through. And right now, that's where we're stretched. We're not lacking interest or momentum. We're working to keep up with both. So here 's how you can help... Right now, there are students ready to step up -- they just need the tools to do it. An activism kit puts everything they need directly into their hands: ✅ Constitutions. ✅ Chapter guides. ✅ Flags. ✅ Materials to organize and lead. It turns a student who wants to speak up... into one who actually does. And you'll make it possible for us to keep saying yes when a student reaches out and says, "I want to start something here." Every activism kit you help sponsor means one more student is ready to lead instead of sitting on the sidelines. That's how we keep saying "yes" when the next student steps forward. That's how this movement actually scales. Because the reality is, the demand is here now. The only question is whether we're equipped to meet it. And that comes down to whether people like you decide to step in and help carry this forward. One final thing: I also wanted to say thank you. If you've supported Turning Point USA before -- whether once or many times -- you've already played a role in building what you're seeing right now. Students finding their voice. More state partnerships. New TPUSA chapters like the one at Charlie's former high school. This kind of momentum doesn't happen without people willing to stand behind it. And we don't take that lightly. I appreciate you taking the time to read this, and for everything you've already done to support this work. | | For Charlie, Andrew Sypher Chief Field OfficerTurning Point USA P.S. Friend, what you're seeing right now is something we've been working toward for years -- a generation of young Americans who are no longer willing to sit quietly while the Left dominates their schools and culture. But moments like this don't sustain themselves. If we don't keep up, we lose ground. It's that simple. We need to keep pace with the growth happening right now -- to fund more activism kits, support more chapters, and make sure no student is left standing alone after they decide to speak up. If you've already supported Turning Point USA in the past, thank you for carrying this movement forward every single day. If you haven't yet, I'm asking you to step in now. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pop Acta Media | Conservative Innovation PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _
